actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woman has been banned from the sport of athletics for taking a performance-enhancing drug.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Alex Woods, 31, of Scott Road, Eastleigh, was found with stab wounds on 6 July.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A Fijian-born player has been suspended for 15 weeks after being red carded for making contact with the eye area of Munster captain CJ Stander in the Challenge Cup.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man was hit across the head near the Saintfield and Ballynahinch Roads in Lisburn early on Wednesday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: This breaking news story is being updated and more details will be published shortly.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A swan is being care for at the Secret World Wildlife Rescue centre in East Huntspill after being seen struggling at Lakeside Holiday Village in Burnham-on-Sea on Friday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A police helicopter was scrambled at about 11:20 BST after flight crews on two separate planes reported seeing the drone in the airspace.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A motorcyclist and pillion passenger were taken to Raigmore Hospital for treatment after being involved in an accident on the A9 just north of Dornoch Bridge.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Learning Town project includes the relocation of Maxwelltown High, St Ninian's and Lochside primaries and Langlands school for children with complex needs to a new campus in the north west of the town.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woman was struck by a Lothian Buses vehicle at the junction of Quality Street and Main Street and she was pronounced dead at the scene.
